text.message: Black has best ows and best everything after only 1 settle
Red are you gonna try and plow to 4 9?
My games over if you do
higher chance blue takes it tbf
So you’re gonna plow if he doesn’t?
If you don’t, I won’t be blocking you
If not I have to try and stop it
Red, if you leave me 4 9 I’ll trade ores
black is going to get to the 3,4 before either of us can take 4,9
I’ll trade you all the ore you want
I want to play the game
mate just play the game lol
I’m offering to never block you
you'll do that until the second it doesn't advantage you hahah
If black gets that’s spot he gets wheat port and best ows
Lets just both play the best game we can
So why not work with the separate player
I’m offering ore for a shitty settle
You wanted to do it for the lol’s
I’m taking you down with me
that's the best spot for them
I gotta stick by my word
it is social but it's also a game, don't just give it away by not using a key element in the right way
Not sure how you want red with that spot more than me blue
we're not gonna play again, the lesson you teach will not benefit you in any way
I said I would solo if I got plowed
Got to stick to my word
only need one settle to win with ows
If you don’t have best ows
For a dev to put on red
I might be able to trade you that wheat oj...
you knew you’d get solo’d the entire game if you plowed
yeah hahah gotta do what you gotta do
Blur would appreciate help with devs
I’m trading a road for a sheep
this is what you just said
I think he meant the other way
why would i trade a road for 1 sheep?
Are you and black friends oj?
Red you lost this game the moment you plowed the desperate guy
yeah you do seem desperate man
are you two friends oj and black?
I get oj, but why attack me black when that is gonna lose you the game?
seems like you guys are teaming up
Nah fam. Was competing for army
well blue is winning this game
bro you do not get a vote in this
you legit set yourself up for the most obvious plow then started crying about it
it would be criminal for me not to do that
I also said I would solo block you
You def should not of plowed.
No reply to what I said
black can you embargo so the game can continue, this dude isn't serious
Blue you’ve been trading me 3:1’s all game
Don’t tell black to embargo now because you’re on 8
I don't knopw how I'm going to recover from this great treachary
if you un embargo me oj i'll trade you a dev xx
Black wasn’t winning this from the start
you were gassing them up when the game started
didn't you pinky promise you'd rob me for the entire game
here i thought oj was a stand up guy
I don’t want blue to win anymore
Lol black traded the road settle lol
we're just actors in your play
orange I think you're gonna win this one actually
i don't think i've disliked anyone more than you in this community
